events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Scenario: Sequence check LOTO industrial site. Crew log shows required preparatory steps finished before current operation. Hold points signed, materials staged in order, no skipped step visible in photo set. Reference OSHA 1910.147. Task: evaluate field condition, return decision. Since no skipped steps, preparatory done, in-progress, likely pass. Need fill fields. decision pass. risk low? LOTO always high if not done, but condition compliant so low. work_stage in-progress. component_conditions empty. percent_complete maybe 40? value 0. sound_source irrelevant empty? schema string, can be empty. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty list, workable empty list. findings maybe none or positive observation. actions maybe continue monitoring. references OSHA 1910.147. Need ensure valid JSON.
